title: Cover
description: Title page for the Investment Decision Lab portfolio report.

title: Contents
description: Clickable table of contents — 8 section entries.

title: Key metrics
description: Expected return, volatility, Sharpe, drawdown, alpha vs. ACWI.

title: Target allocation
description: Horizontal bar chart of bucket weights with asset-class groupings.

title: ETF implementation
description: 10 UCITS ETFs with bucket, exchange, currency, distribution, ISIN, ticker, TER, weight.

title: Top 10 equity holdings
description: Holding, source ETF, % of portfolio, % of equity portion.

title: Monte Carlo projection
description: P10 / P50 / P90 line chart over the horizon plus the metric grid.

title: Fee estimate
description: Headline costs and per-bucket breakdown (weight, TER bps, contribution bps).

title: Methodology
description: Five-step description of how the engine builds the portfolio.

title: Disclaimer (I of II)
description: Sections 1 to 4: no advice, past performance, Monte Carlo limits, FX.

title: Disclaimer (II of II)
description: Sections 5 to 7: data sources, costs and taxes, suitability.

title: Risk warning
description: Final Important Disclaimer & Risk Warning — full 7-paragraph notice; BICon showcase attribution.
